name: Brush Tap
description: Single brush stroke on snare with jazzy touch

simple: single wire brush tap on snare drum head
standard: single wire brush tap on snare drum head
soft swish of jazz brush across snare wires
gentle percussive whisper on drum skin
detailed: single wire brush tap on snare drum head
soft swish of jazz brush across snare wires
gentle percussive whisper on drum skin
brush handle clicking on rim with quiet grace
drummer's ghost note barely touching the surface

instruments: wire brushes swirling on snare head
